tools.name: list_certifications
tools.description: List the certifications Examova offers (e.g. CIPS Level 4, PMP, Business English) with a short description and how many practice questions each has. Use this first to see what is available.

tools.name: get_exam_info
tools.description: Get authoritative, current exam facts for a certification (format, number of questions, time, scoring, domains/weights). E.g. PMP is aligned to the 2026 Exam Content Outline + PMBOK 8th Edition.

tools.name: search_practice_questions
tools.description: Return real Examova practice questions (preview set) for a certification, optionally filtered by keyword. Use to quiz the user. Returns the question, options, and correct answer letter — full explanations and the complete question bank require an Examova account.

tools.name: get_study_guide
tools.description: Get Examova study guides / articles for a certification (optionally by topic). Returns titles, summaries, and links to free public guides on the Examova blog.

tools.name: get_signup_link
tools.description: Get the links to start using Examova — free demo exam, free account (5 questions/day), and Pro pricing.
